title: Vivian Conley
summary: The Cleaner leader in Warlords of New York and one of Aaron Keener's four lieutenants.

claims.text: The Warlords of New York faction recap identifies Vivian Conley as the new leader under whom the Cleaners regroup and recruit.
Conley is one of Aaron Keener's four lieutenants.

paragraphs.text: Conley's leadership marks the Cleaners' reorganization after Joe Ferro's death and ties the returning faction to Keener's Lower Manhattan network.

verification.notes: Mission outcome and biographical detail require separate direct evidence.
